'''鈭歷-f-ch-n''' ('''kavafchenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tick|tick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-f-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tick|tick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-f-ch-n
|-
! Lemma
| kavafchenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivafchenoko|thivafchenoko]] || [[word:jivafchenoko|jivafchenoko]] || [[word:shivafchenoko|shivafchenoko]] || [[word:kivafchenoko|kivafchenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvafchenoko|thuthuvafchenoko]] || [[word:jujuvafchenoko|jujuvafchenoko]] || [[word:shushuvafchenoko|shushuvafchenoko]] || [[word:kukuvafchenoko|kukuvafchenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvafchenoko|thuvafchenoko]] || [[word:juvafchenoko|juvafchenoko]] || [[word:shuvafchenoko|shuvafchenoko]] || [[word:kuvafchenoko|kuvafchenoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevafchenoko|thevafchenoko]] || [[word:jevafchenoko|jevafchenoko]] || [[word:shevafchenoko|shevafchenoko]] || [[word:kevafchenoko|kevafchenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovafchenoko|thothovafchenoko]] || [[word:jojovafchenoko|jojovafchenoko]] || [[word:shoshovafchenoko|shoshovafchenoko]] || [[word:kokovafchenoko|kokovafchenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovafchenoko|thovafchenoko]] || [[word:jovafchenoko|jovafchenoko]] || [[word:shovafchenoko|shovafchenoko]] || [[word:kovafchenoko|kovafchenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovafchenoko|thovafchenoko]] || [[word:jovafchenoko|jovafchenoko]] || [[word:shovafchenoko|shovafchenoko]] || [[word:kovafchenoko|kovafchenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vafchenoko|th忙vafchenoko]] || [[word:j忙vafchenoko|j忙vafchenoko]] || [[word:sh忙vafchenoko|sh忙vafchenoko]] || [[word:k忙vafchenoko|k忙vafchenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavafchenoko|thavafchenoko]] || [[word:javafchenoko|javafchenoko]] || [[word:shavafchenoko|shavafchenoko]] || [[word:kavafchenoko|kavafchenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
